title: bidens pilosa var. albus
intro: Bidens pilosa var. albus, also known as white beggarticks, is a variant of the Bidens pilosa plant species, belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Bidens pilosa var. albus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
